title: crassula tetragona subsp. tetragona
intro: Crassula tetragona subsp. tetragona, also known as the "air plant" or "jade plant," is a succulent plant species in the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Crassula tetragona subsp. tetragona include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be consumed as a tea or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
